meta.summary: WhatsHap 2.8 for read-based variant phasing, polyploid phasing, haplotagging, and phasing statistics.
meta.description: WhatsHap 2.8 for read-based variant phasing, polyploid phasing, haplotagging, and phasing statistics.

test: whatshap --version 2>&1 | grep -F '2.8' >/dev/null && (whatshap --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && (whatshap --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'phase' >/dev/null && (whatshap --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'haplotag' >/dev/null && whatshap phase --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && whatshap haplotag --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && whatshap stats --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && python -c 'import whatshap, pysam, pyfaidx' && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.23.1' >/dev/null && bcftools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bcftools 1.23.1' >/dev/null && bgzip --help >/dev/null && tabix --help >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-whatshap-phase-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>chr1
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && printf '##fileformat=VCFv4.2
##contig=<ID=chr1,length=100>
##FORMAT=<ID=GT,Number=1,Type=String,Description="Genotype">
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	sample
chr1	10	.	A	G	.	PASS	.	GT	0/1
chr1	20	.	A	T	.	PASS	.	GT	0/1
' > variants.vcf && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
@RG	ID:rg1	SM:sample
read_ref	0	chr1	1	60	30M	*	0	0	AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read_alt	0	chr1	1	60	30M	*	0	0	AAAAAAAAAGAAAAAAAAATAAAAAAAAAA	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam > reads.unsorted.bam && samtools sort -o reads.bam reads.unsorted.bam && samtools index reads.bam && whatshap phase --reference ref.fa -o phased.vcf variants.vcf reads.bam > whatshap.phase.log 2>&1 && test -s phased.vcf && grep -F 'PS' phased.vcf >/dev/null && { grep -F '0|1' phased.vcf >/dev/null || grep -F '1|0' phased.vcf >/dev/null; } && bcftools view -Oz -o phased.vcf.gz phased.vcf && tabix -p vcf phased.vcf.gz && test -s phased.vcf.gz.tbi && cd / && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: WhatsHap
upstream.citation: Martin et al. 2016. WhatsHap: fast and accurate read-based phasing.
